comment: needs:* → human (HOW-TO §6: any needs:answer/approval/decision/access = waiting on Mateusz, stop). Evaluated first so a blocked task always routes to the human regardless of state. Wildcard is separator-agnostic in the matcher — matches both the colon form (needs:answer, HOW-TO §6 doc convention) and the hyphen form (needs-decision, the actual Linear label name in this workspace).
In Review + coded → review (DEV→REVIEW handoff). Linear exposes the leaf label `coded` (linear-ops.mjs accepts `ai:coded` as an add-alias, but the API returns `coded`).
stage:testing → test (REVIEW→TEST handoff, after approve + version).
